rationale: Creates `typebot/diagnostico-bow360-esx-2026-importavel.json` (2037 lines) as a complete Typebot v6.1 flow. The diff matches every claim in the Portuguese PR body. `input-telefone` block with `variableId: var-telefone` and `phone number input`-style placeholder sits between the email and empresa groups (verified via the edges `edge-name-to-email`, then phone input, then `edge-...-to-empresa`). The webhook block at `group-webhook` POSTs to `[SUA_URL_N8N]/webhook/bow360-diagnostico` with a body containing `telefone`, `source: ESX2026`, and `source2: diagnostico-ia` exactly as specified. The variables list declares all 15 expected entries (nome, email, telefone, empresa, pontuacao, pontuacao_normalizada, nivel, resposta_aberta, webhook_resposta, plus resposta_q1..q6) with `var-telefone` present. The theme uses neon `#cffb03` in `progressBar.color`, `hostBubbles.color`, `buttons.backgroundColor`, the customCss progress-bar gradient and the host-bubble box shadow. README is also updated to point to the importable file. The PR title says `Update` but the file is new — this is the first commit landing the full asset; the body's `atualiza` (`updates`) describes diffs against in-session iterations the agent had been working on, not against a previously-committed file in the repo.
